messages.body_preview:
SELECT
    machine_name,
    log_level,
    log_time,
    description,
    pid,
    tid,
    title,
    component,
    trace_id,
    file_name,
    log_offset,
    environment,
    machine_function,
    year,
    month,
    day
FROM dliss
messages.body_content:
SELECT
    machine_name,
    log_level,
    log_time,
    description,
    pid,
    tid,
    title,
    component,
    trace_id,
    file_name,
    log_offset,
    environment,
    machine_function,
    year,
    month,
    day
FROM dlissensitivelog 
WHERE 
  file_name LIKE 'DLMSUserLog_ContainerOutput%.log'
  -- WHERE file_name LIKE 'TelemetryServerAutoscaleOnboarding%.log'
  -- AND day = TIMESTAMP '2025-12-02'
  -- AND log_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2025-12-30 00:00:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2025-12-30 18:00:00'
  -- AND 
  AND log_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2026-02-27 18:20:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2026-04-28 19:00:00'
  -- day BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2025-08-17' AND TIMESTAMP '2025-08-19'
  -- AND description LIKE '%06e500f1-5bb8-425c-9475-df7d1be4e07e%'
  -- AND log_level = 'e'
  -- AND title = 'GpuMonitor'
  AND machine_name = 'BN2BEAP00005CC8'
  -- AND environment LIKE 'IndexServeDLModelServe-Prod-MWHE01'
LIMIT 10000;

messages.body_content:
SELECT
    machine_name,
    log_level,
    log_time,
    description,
    pid,
    tid,
    title,
    component,
    trace_id,
    file_name,
    log_offset,
    environment,
    machine_function,
    year,
    month,
    day
FROM dlissensitivelog 
WHERE 
  file_name LIKE 'DLMSUserLog_ContainerOutput%.log'
  -- WHERE file_name LIKE 'TelemetryServerAutoscaleOnboarding%.log'
  -- AND day = TIMESTAMP '2025-12-02'
  -- AND log_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2025-12-30 00:00:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2025-12-30 18:00:00'
  -- AND 
  AND log_time BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2026-02-27 18:20:00' AND TIMESTAMP '2026-02-28 19:00:00'
  -- day BETWEEN TIMESTAMP '2025-08-17' AND TIMESTAMP '2025-08-19'
  -- AND description LIKE '%06e500f1-5bb8-425c-9475-df7d1be4e07e%'
  -- AND log_level = 'e'
  -- AND title = 'GpuMonitor'
  AND machine_name = 'BN2BEAP0000495E'
  -- AND environment LIKE 'IndexServeDLModelServe-Prod-MWHE01'
LIMIT 10000;
